summary.intent: Implement task #218: a framework-agnostic DropZone core component for ars-components, including state machine, MIME validation, callbacks, ConnectApi attributes, snapshots, spec conformance, proptest, and the mandatory post-implementation audit and Codex review loop.
summary.outcome: DropZone agnostic core implemented and merged into PR #674 across four Codex review rounds; all review findings fixed with regression tests, mutation testing reached 0 missed mutants, and the spec was updated to match the best-outcome contract including structured rejection details, Duration-based delays, and live-region announcement accessors.

repo: Spec is authoritative over issue text; ARIA and data-attribute naming in old issues may be stale (e.g. aria-dropeffect → aria-description, data-ars-dragging-over → data-ars-drag-over)
Time-related props must use core::time::Duration, never u32 millisecond suffixed fields

Localized announcements follow the Tabs pattern: agnostic Api exposes typed accessor methods (e.g. drop_accepted_announcement()), adapters pass values to their LiveRegion — discarded let _x = ... is always wrong
cargo xci --profile fast is the required pre-push gate; a single transient test failure should be retried in isolation before rerunning the gate
post-implementation-audit and waiting-for-codex-review are mandatory repo skills; audit must be completed and all findings landed before the PR is opened
cargo mutants is used as a required mutation gate; missed survivors must be closed with regression tests, not exclusions
Snapshot files changed in a PR must be labeled snapshot-reviewed before merge
ars-interactions provides canonical DragItem and DropOperation types; the DropZone machine reuses them directly without wrapping
Proptest invariants must be updated when new terminal state transitions are added — AutoReset returning to Idle while preserving accepted form_data invalidates state-only invariants

code.finding: AutoReset and explicit Reset are separate events: AutoReset returns visual state to Idle while preserving accepted form_data; Reset clears all payload, but only fires a state change when there is actually something to clear (guarded by reset_would_change_context)
SetProps must remember the current advertised hover types in Context so it can recompute valid_drag when accept list changes mid-drag
DropEnter/DropMove/DropExit effects must only emit for valid drag payloads; activation is gated on valid_drag; invalid hover suppresses callbacks
max_files validation must count only DragItem::File entries, not total items in the drag payload
DragEnter from terminal states (DropAccepted/DropRejected) must cancel the pending ResetAfterDrop named effect to prevent stale timer from resetting new drag state

Browser drag payloads with only a Files entry in dataTransfer.types should be accepted as a potentially valid file hover — Files is not a MIME type but signals file content; reject only at actual drop time
Post-AutoReset Idle state can legitimately expose non-empty form_data(); proptest invariant must track accepted payload presence separately from state

workflow: TDD red-green loop: write the full failing test batch first, compile-fail verifies missing types, then implement against tests
Mutation testing pass order: run cargo mutants, read missed.txt, add focused regression tests for each survivor category, rerun — never suppress missed mutants

Codex review loop: push, comment @codex review, poll reactions/threads, fix every thread with a regression test, reply with commit SHA, resolve thread, retrigger — repeat until 👍 with no unresolved threads
GitHub Actions may not auto-trigger for a pushed commit if it was rebased/merged manually; use gh workflow run CI --ref <branch> to dispatch manually
git restore --staged --worktree to unstage formatter-only churn files that cargo xci touched outside the PR scope before committing
llvm-cov focused coverage command (-- utility::drop_zone) gives per-file line/region numbers useful for spotting untested branches before mutation run

friction: Mutation run took 61+ minutes for 124 mutants requiring dozens of polling cycles with write_stdin; no progress indicator between mutant results
cargo xci fast gate produced a transient ars-e2e fixture-server timeout failure, requiring a full gate rerun to get a clean result
GitHub Actions did not automatically attach a CI run to the commit after user's manual merge/rebase; required gh workflow run dispatch to get checks on the final head SHA
gh pr checks reported no checks for the latest head SHA even while check-suites API showed runs queued — tooling inconsistency required falling back to gh api directly
Formatter (cargo +nightly fmt) staged an unrelated formatting change in crates/ars-dioxus/tests/attr_passthrough.rs during the pre-push gate, requiring manual unstaging
Working tree was ahead of remote after user's manual merge, requiring git pull --ff-only before continuing the review loop — caused a context gap in mid-session state
Four Codex review rounds were needed (file drag types, SetProps revalidation, extension tokens, idle reset after AutoReset) — each round required a full fix-commit-push-reply-resolve-retrigger cycle
open_items: Leptos adapter implementation for DropZone not included in this task (explicitly deferred per plan assumptions)
Dioxus adapter implementation for DropZone not included in this task (explicitly deferred per plan assumptions)
Browser event extraction, DOM listeners, file handles, hit testing, and live element references remain adapter/platform concerns — no agnostic hooks for these yet
Coverage and release verification CI jobs were still pending at session end for the final merged commit
Issue #218 remains open pending PR merge with full green CI
